name: media-tools
description: A plugin bundling two skills: Pretext (text measurement without DOM reflows) and YouTube Downloader (interactive video downloading with yt-dlp).

skills.name: pretext
skills.description: Help developers use @chenglou/pretext, the 15KB TypeScript text measurement library that computes exact text metrics without DOM reflows.

skills.name: youtube-downloader
skills.description: Download YouTube videos with interactive resolution and subtitle selection using yt-dlp.
